name: PyTorch Scientific ML (Cookbook)
description: PyTorch JupyterLab plus tensorboard (see context/requirements.txt), built from this template's Dockerfile. Shared by several labpod-cookbook notebooks (GPU basics, neural operator, PINN, U-Net, diffusion), all of which log training curves for the TensorBoard launcher - import and build this once, then run any of them. See github.com/LabPod/labpod-cookbook/tree/main/pytorch-scientific-ml.

ports.name: tensorboard
ports.label: TensorBoard
ports.install_hint: already installed by this template's Dockerfile
ports.option_schema_json: {"fields":[{"name":"LOGDIR","type":"directory","label":"Log directory","default":"/work/runs","help":"Every notebook in this cookbook logs to /work/runs/<name> - pick the parent runs/ folder to see all of them, or a specific subfolder for just one."}]}
